title: Name Tag Mobs To Be Friends
description: Name Mobs "Friend" to Make them Friendly Towards Players
body:
**A Very Basic Datapack that lets players name hostile or neutral mobs "friend" to turn them passive towards players.**

_Useful for roleplay, companionship, or adding life to builds without endangering players._

- Mobs can be renamed without becoming hostile.
- Removes items from the friended mob's hands.
- Prevents friended mobs from burning in sunlight or being zombified.
- Bosses cannot be converted.
- Friended mobs do not drop anything.


This system works using Minecraft's team commands.
